prompt: A young boy with tousled hair and wide eyes, watching a kite fly high against a backdrop of a clear blue sky.
prompt_refined: A photorealistic image of a young boy, approximately 7 years old, with tousled light brown hair and wide, wonder-filled eyes. He is standing in an open, sunlit grassy field, looking intently upwards. High in the vast, clear azure blue sky, a vibrant, multi-colored diamond kite soars prominently in the upper-right section of the frame. A few soft, wispy clouds are scattered across the horizon.
objects: young boy (approx. 7 years old, tousled light brown hair, wide, wonder-filled eyes, looking upwards)
vibrant, multi-colored diamond kite (in the upper-right section of the frame)
soft, wispy clouds (scattered across the horizon)
